common.ctaSubtitle: Open to remote and contract work. Tell me about your project and I'll respond within 24 hours.

home.aboutIntro: I'm {name}, a {title} focused on delivering reliable, scalable software for businesses — from customer-facing applications and APIs to cloud infrastructure and production deployments.

blog.label: Insights
blog.title: Blog & case studies
blog.subtitle: Architecture decisions, delivery lessons, and deep dives from projects I've shipped.

expertise.label: Skills & Services
expertise.title: What I build and how I work
expertise.subtitle: From production web apps and APIs to cloud infrastructure — here are the services I deliver and the technologies behind them.

work.label: Work
work.title: Selected work
work.subtitle: Production systems I've designed, built, and shipped across e-commerce, fintech, and enterprise.
work.projectCta: I work remotely with startups and businesses worldwide - on contract or project basis.

services.label: Services
services.title: What I can build for you
services.subtitle: Web apps, APIs, SaaS products, and cloud infrastructure - tailored for remote and contract engagements.
services.intro: {availability} I partner with founders and teams who need a reliable software engineer from architecture through production launch.
services.bottomDesc: Describe your project and I'll recommend the right approach — no commitment required.

about.label: About me
about.para1: I'm {name}, a {title} based in India. I help startups and businesses design, build, and ship production-grade software - from customer-facing web applications to backend APIs and cloud infrastructure.
about.para2: My work spans e-commerce platforms, fintech systems, real-time messaging consoles, and enterprise ERP software. I take projects from requirements through architecture, test-driven development, deployment, and ongoing support.
about.para3: I believe in transparent communication, clean architecture, and delivering software that solves real business problems.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.subtitle: Share your project requirements or request a call — I'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.messageHint: Tell me about the service you need and your project goals.
contact.callHint: Pick a preferred date and time in your timezone — I'll see the IST equivalent.

process.label: Approach
process.title: How I deliver value
process.subtitle: Understanding your business goals and delivering tailored digital solutions with modern technology.

profile.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
profile.tagline: I build production-grade web platforms, APIs, and cloud systems for startups and businesses worldwide.
profile.availability: Available for remote contract and project-based work worldwide.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Modern, high-performance web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript - from business websites to advanced enterprise platforms.

backend.title: Backend & API Development
backend.description: Scalable REST APIs, microservices, authentication, database design, and third-party integrations built for production workloads.

saas.title: SaaS & Product Engineering
saas.description: MVPs, admin dashboards, multi-tenant architectures, and subscription flows - shipped with clean architecture and test-driven practices.

cloud.title: Cloud & DevOps
cloud.description: AWS infrastructure, Docker, Terraform, CI/CD pipelines, and zero-downtime deployments for reliable production systems.

engineering.title: Production-grade engineering
engineering.description: Clean architecture, automated testing, and code structured to perform reliably under real-world load.

delivery.title: End-to-end delivery
delivery.description: Requirements through architecture, development, deployment, and post-launch support — one accountable owner.

communication.title: Clear communication
communication.description: Defined milestones, regular progress updates, and direct access throughout the engagement.

stack.title: Modern, proven stack
stack.description: React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and AWS — technologies validated in production.

understand.title: Understand
understand.description: I learn your business goals, users, and constraints - then define scope, milestones, and success metrics.

design.title: Design & Architect
design.description: System design, database schema, and a delivery plan that balances speed with long-term maintainability.

build.title: Build & Ship
build.description: Iterative development with staging environments, code reviews, and transparent progress throughout.

launch.title: Launch & Support
launch.description: Production deployment, monitoring, documentation, and ongoing support for a smooth handoff.

outcomes.title: Business outcomes first
outcomes.description: Technical decisions are measured by the results they create — not by complexity or novelty.

quality.title: Quality and reliability
quality.description: Software that holds up in production: tested, documented, and built for the long term.

partnerships.title: Trusted partnerships
partnerships.description: Consistent delivery, honest communication, and support that extends beyond launch day.

wonderwhy.description: Delivered enterprise logistics software end-to-end — trip management, GST compliance, financial reporting, and AWS infrastructure for a fleet operations platform.

independent.description: Partner with businesses across e-commerce, fintech, and messaging to architect, build, and deploy production systems — from MVP to scale.
